ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round in which the match was played */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the match was played */,
  "gameid" TEXT /* Unique game ID for the match */,
  "gameid_b" TEXT /* Alternative game ID (gameid_b) for the match */,
  "gameid_c" TEXT /* Alternative game ID (gameid_c) for the match */,
  "gameid_seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the match in the team's schedule */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is the home team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went into overtime */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match was decided by penalties */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistic applies */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the given year */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the given year */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team in the given year */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "average_possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "average_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Average pass accuracy percentage */,
  "average_shots_on_target" REAL /* Average number of shots on target per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the player plays */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistic applies */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the given year */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the given year */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player (if applicable) */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the player plays */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_sequence" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "gameid_seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the match in the team's schedule */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_sequence_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_sequence_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameid_last_1" (
  "gameid_last_1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game ID entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "gameid_last_1" TEXT /* Most recent game ID for the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameid_last_1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameid_last_2" (
  "gameid_last_2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game ID entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "gameid_last_2" TEXT /* Second most recent game ID for the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gameid_last_2_id")
)
